title: Dryo's Wynn Edits
description: A Purple/White themed recolor pack for Wynncraft! Also comes with a couple other changes.
body:
# Hello!

This resource pack changes [Wynncraft](https://wynncraft.com/)'s look into a Purple/White theme, with a couple of additional tweaks. It also includes recolors for elements from [Wynntils](https://modrinth.com/mod/wynntils)!

**Thank you [SpektrSoyuz](https://modrinth.com/user/SpektrSoyuz) for allowing me to use your project [WynnEdits - Dark Theme](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/wynnedits-dark-theme) as a base for this pack!**

**This pack also includes the [Specialist For Mythics](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/specialist-for-mythics) resource pack**, and will include any other relevant Wynncraft packs I may or may not create in the future!

Brief list of changes;
- All of the Wynncraft HUD and GUI Textures
- Wynntils menu textures
- Adjusted transparency of Wynntils lootrun objective icons
- Changed audio for Wynntils' Mythic Found and Cache Found jingles

If you want the text colors of the numbers above the bars shown in the gallery or the video tutorial here's the code for it: 
```
#f9b2ffdf
```


# **⚠️IMPORTANT⚠️**

This resource pack adjusts Wynntils' default health bars in a very specific way requiring a bit of an adjustment from you to make it look cleaner! I plan to eventually release a modpack which will have this done by default! 

_(You can also ignore this section entirely if you don't care about making your stuff look clean)_

Here are the instructions for adjusting the health bar; (video guide below)

1) Open your Wynntils menu, go to "Overlay Management" and find the "Health Bar" and "Mana Bar" options

2) Ensure both bars are set to the **A** texture, then scroll down and ensure "Overlay Position", "Overlay Size" and "Horizontal / Vertical Alignment Override" is set to default (click the "reset" button if it's lit up)

3) For "Health Bar" **only**, enable the "Flip" option

4) After doing all of that, click on "Health Bar", then "Free Move", then click on the Health Bar box once to select it. Now you will press the right arrow key **17 times**, then **hold shift, press the down arrow once** to change the vertical alignment, and after that press the down arrow **5 times**, doing this should make the health bar perfectly aligned with center of the hotbar.

5) For the mana bar, repeat the same steps but instead with the left arrow keys!
After doing this, both bars should be perfectly aligned. You can check the gallery section for reference.

Video guide can be found [here](https://youtu.be/LxmJe9lLsJo). (I'm aware this is very inconvenient but I can't really share configs here)
